mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, auth_type, api_server_url, skip_tls_verify, token, ca_cert_data, client_cert_data, client_key_data, kubeconfig_content, default_cluster, status, status_message, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clusters WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT FROM clusters WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND default_cluster = 1 LIMIT 1
